impact: This catches malformed Python in ppd.extraction.urban_forestry_permit_requirements with a single-module import before any broader Urban Forestry requirement validation is allowed to run.
summary: Add a narrow syntax-first Urban Forestry requirement import sentinel and minimal target module.
target_task: Task checkbox-105: Add a one-file syntax-first import test for `ppd.extraction.urban_forestry_permit_requirements` that imports only that module and fails malformed Python before broad Urban Forestry requirement validation runs.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
